mypaintr 0.0.1

    • Hand demo
    • Introduction to mypaintr

Compute or draw rough polygons

Source: R/draw-rough.R
rough_polygons.Rd

Compute or draw rough polygons

Usage

rough_polygons(x, y = NULL, hand = NULL)

rough_polygon(x, y = NULL, hand = NULL)

draw_rough_polygons(
  x,
  y = NULL,
  hand = NULL,
  col = NA,
  border = graphics::par("fg"),
  fill_pattern = NULL,
  ...
)

Arguments

x, y

Polygon coordinates.

hand

Hand-drawn geometry settings created with hand().

col

Fill colour. When visible and fill_pattern is NULL, a solid fill is drawn.

border

Border colour.

fill_pattern

Optional fill pattern created with hatch(), crosshatch(), zigzag(), or jumble().

...

Graphics parameters passed to graphics::lines().

Value

A list with x and y components containing a roughened closed outline suitable for plotting with graphics::lines().

See also

Other rough drawing helpers: rough_arrows(), rough_lines(), rough_points(), rough_polypath(), rough_rect(), rough_segments()

Examples

rough_polygons(c(2, 5, 8, 3), c(2, 7, 5, 1))
#> $x
#>   [1] 2.000000 2.043478 2.086957 2.130435 2.173913 2.217391 2.260870 2.304348
#>   [9] 2.347826 2.391304 2.434783 2.478261 2.521739 2.565217 2.608696 2.652174
#>  [17] 2.695652 2.739130 2.782609 2.826087 2.869565 2.913043 2.956522 3.000000
#>  [25] 3.043478 3.086957 3.130435 3.173913 3.217391 3.260870 3.304348 3.347826
#>  [33] 3.391304 3.434783 3.478261 3.521739 3.565217 3.608696 3.652174 3.695652
#>  [41] 3.739130 3.782609 3.826087 3.869565 3.913043 3.956522 4.000000 4.043478
#>  [49] 4.086957 4.130435 4.173913 4.217391 4.260870 4.304348 4.347826 4.391304
#>  [57] 4.434783 4.478261 4.521739 4.565217 4.608696 4.652174 4.695652 4.739130
#>  [65] 4.782609 4.826087 4.869565 4.913043 4.956522 5.000000 5.069767 5.139535
#>  [73] 5.209302 5.279070 5.348837 5.418605 5.488372 5.558140 5.627907 5.697674
#>  [81] 5.767442 5.837209 5.906977 5.976744 6.046512 6.116279 6.186047 6.255814
#>  [89] 6.325581 6.395349 6.465116 6.534884 6.604651 6.674419 6.744186 6.813953
#>  [97] 6.883721 6.953488 7.023256 7.093023 7.162791 7.232558 7.302326 7.372093
#> [105] 7.441860 7.511628 7.581395 7.651163 7.720930 7.790698 7.860465 7.930233
#> [113] 8.000000 7.934211 7.868421 7.802632 7.736842 7.671053 7.605263 7.539474
#> [121] 7.473684 7.407895 7.342105 7.276316 7.210526 7.144737 7.078947 7.013158
#> [129] 6.947368 6.881579 6.815789 6.750000 6.684211 6.618421 6.552632 6.486842
#> [137] 6.421053 6.355263 6.289474 6.223684 6.157895 6.092105 6.026316 5.960526
#> [145] 5.894737 5.828947 5.763158 5.697368 5.631579 5.565789 5.500000 5.434211
#> [153] 5.368421 5.302632 5.236842 5.171053 5.105263 5.039474 4.973684 4.907895
#> [161] 4.842105 4.776316 4.710526 4.644737 4.578947 4.513158 4.447368 4.381579
#> [169] 4.315789 4.250000 4.184211 4.118421 4.052632 3.986842 3.921053 3.855263
#> [177] 3.789474 3.723684 3.657895 3.592105 3.526316 3.460526 3.394737 3.328947
#> [185] 3.263158 3.197368 3.131579 3.065789 3.000000 2.937500 2.875000 2.812500
#> [193] 2.750000 2.687500 2.625000 2.562500 2.500000 2.437500 2.375000 2.312500
#> [201] 2.250000 2.187500 2.125000 2.062500 2.000000
#> 
#> $y
#>   [1] 2.000000 2.072464 2.144928 2.217391 2.289855 2.362319 2.434783 2.507246
#>   [9] 2.579710 2.652174 2.724638 2.797101 2.869565 2.942029 3.014493 3.086957
#>  [17] 3.159420 3.231884 3.304348 3.376812 3.449275 3.521739 3.594203 3.666667
#>  [25] 3.739130 3.811594 3.884058 3.956522 4.028986 4.101449 4.173913 4.246377
#>  [33] 4.318841 4.391304 4.463768 4.536232 4.608696 4.681159 4.753623 4.826087
#>  [41] 4.898551 4.971014 5.043478 5.115942 5.188406 5.260870 5.333333 5.405797
#>  [49] 5.478261 5.550725 5.623188 5.695652 5.768116 5.840580 5.913043 5.985507
#>  [57] 6.057971 6.130435 6.202899 6.275362 6.347826 6.420290 6.492754 6.565217
#>  [65] 6.637681 6.710145 6.782609 6.855072 6.927536 7.000000 6.953488 6.906977
#>  [73] 6.860465 6.813953 6.767442 6.720930 6.674419 6.627907 6.581395 6.534884
#>  [81] 6.488372 6.441860 6.395349 6.348837 6.302326 6.255814 6.209302 6.162791
#>  [89] 6.116279 6.069767 6.023256 5.976744 5.930233 5.883721 5.837209 5.790698
#>  [97] 5.744186 5.697674 5.651163 5.604651 5.558140 5.511628 5.465116 5.418605
#> [105] 5.372093 5.325581 5.279070 5.232558 5.186047 5.139535 5.093023 5.046512
#> [113] 5.000000 4.947368 4.894737 4.842105 4.789474 4.736842 4.684211 4.631579
#> [121] 4.578947 4.526316 4.473684 4.421053 4.368421 4.315789 4.263158 4.210526
#> [129] 4.157895 4.105263 4.052632 4.000000 3.947368 3.894737 3.842105 3.789474
#> [137] 3.736842 3.684211 3.631579 3.578947 3.526316 3.473684 3.421053 3.368421
#> [145] 3.315789 3.263158 3.210526 3.157895 3.105263 3.052632 3.000000 2.947368
#> [153] 2.894737 2.842105 2.789474 2.736842 2.684211 2.631579 2.578947 2.526316
#> [161] 2.473684 2.421053 2.368421 2.315789 2.263158 2.210526 2.157895 2.105263
#> [169] 2.052632 2.000000 1.947368 1.894737 1.842105 1.789474 1.736842 1.684211
#> [177] 1.631579 1.578947 1.526316 1.473684 1.421053 1.368421 1.315789 1.263158
#> [185] 1.210526 1.157895 1.105263 1.052632 1.000000 1.062500 1.125000 1.187500
#> [193] 1.250000 1.312500 1.375000 1.437500 1.500000 1.562500 1.625000 1.687500
#> [201] 1.750000 1.812500 1.875000 1.937500 2.000000
#> 
plot(1:10, 1:10, type = "n")
draw_rough_polygons(c(2, 5, 8, 3), c(2, 7, 5, 1),
                    col = "grey90",
                    fill_pattern = zigzag())
